message:
feat(tests): add platform-specific fixtures and validation utilities

Add comprehensive test infrastructure enhancements:

- platform.rs: Platform detection, line ending normalization, box char
  conversion, TerminalEnv simulation for testing terminal environments
- validation.rs: FixtureValidator for determinism checking,
  SnapshotValidator for managing Insta snapshots, content validators

This completes bd-6gxh (Golden fixtures and snapshot management).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
